rationale: The citation is used repeatedly to frame the paper's contribution, not just as a background list item. The authors explicitly position their study as complementing and extending Narayanan, Manchanda, and Chintagunta (2005) from physician-directed promotion dynamics (detailing) to consumer-directed DTCA dynamics in a regulated market. In the findings, they also use that prior paper as a benchmark to interpret their own detailing dynamics (including the goodwill-based explanation), which indicates a meaningful conceptual and interpretive role.
relation_description: The citing paper extends Narayanan et al. (2005) by moving the dynamic communication analysis from physician-directed detailing to regulated consumer-directed advertising (generic vs brand DTCA). It also anchors interpretation of its detailing results against Narayanan et al.'s reported temporal pattern.
